item.description:
Harpic Pine Active Fresh Toilet Cleaner, 750ml Pack of 3

  • Experience a perfectly fresh toilet everytime! Harpic Active Fresh Pine leaves your toilet perfectly clean shiny and disinfected
  • Enjoy long-lasting freshness and a touch of cleanliness with Harpic toilet cleaner as it removes all tough stains cleans above and below the waterline leaving your bathroom with a pleasant pine fragrance and a fresh look
  • Also explore Harpic's products range like - Bathroom Cleaner Drain Opener Flush Matic In-Cistern Toiler Cleaner Toilet Blocks and Toilet Cleaner
  • How To Use: We recommend you to wear your gloves while you clean your toilet bowl
  • Lift up the toilet seat and carefully direct the nozzle under the toilet rim
  • Squeeze and apply slowly all around the inside of the bowl allowing enough liquid to cover the bowl completely
  • For best results leave for 30 minutes then brush and flush
  • Leave overnight for tough stains
  • Wash hands and exposed skin before meals and after use

item.description: Clorox For Whites, Liquid, 500 mL, Stain Remover And Supreme Whitener, Removes 100% of Everyday Stains SUPERIOR STAIN REMOVAL: Use Clorox Clothes for Whites with your detergent to remove greasy stains as well as coffee, tea, ketchup and fruit juice. It removes 100% of everyday stains. It is also safe on sensitive washable fabrics like silk and wool. SUPREME WHITENER: Clorox Clothes for whites is ideal for your white clothes & your whites with a touch of color, thobes and delicates, keeping your whites bright. BEFORE WASHING: Apply Clorox Clothes for Whites directly on the stain. Rub the fabric gently and let stand for 5 minutes. Wash normally and do not allow product to dry on the fabric. It is also effective on dried-in stains. FOR IN WASH: Instead of washing with detergent alone, add 100 ml (2 caps) of Clorox Clothes for Whites with your favorite detergent. Start your normal wash cycle. Effective at cold temperatures for best results wash at 40 degrees. FOR SOAKING: Add 10 ml (2 teaspoons) of our Clorox Clothes for Whites to each 1L of water with your favorite detergent. Soak for 5 minutes. Wash as usual. For tough stains soak for 1 hour the most. Clorox will remove your toughest stains.

The product is specially formulated to eliminate stains caused by coffee, tea, wine, grease, and other common household spills. It is easy to use, simply spray the cleaner on the stain, agitate with a brush, and blot with a clean cloth. The fast-acting formula quickly penetrates the stain and lifts it out of the fibers of the carpet or upholstery. item.description:
LocknLock Eco Food Container Round 600ml W/Eco Outer-Sleeve Multicolor
In a bid to be more eco-friendly, Lock & Lock have designed a range of eco-conscious food boxes made from the off-cuts from the production of their original, clear tubs that you already love so much, and we’re happy to report they’re every bit as solid and reliable! These high-quality food boxes are made from 100% food grade plastic, salvaged from the production of the original clear and coloured versions; the off-cuts would usually come off the machine and be sold on to make single-use items that might well end up in landfill, but Lock & Lock have created these eco containers to avoid wasting all that perfectly good plastic. They’re helping the environment whilst maintaining all the same fantastic qualities as standard Lock & Lock products. Freezer Safe, Dishwasher Safe, Microwave Safe

item.description:
Clorox Scentiva Toilet Cleaner, Madagascar Citrus Grove, Bleach Free Toilet Bowl Cleaner,709ml
DISINFECT AND SET THE MOOD: Our scents were inspired by nature and exclusively crafted by top fragrance houses. Let the Japanese Spring Blossom scent welcome you with its aromatic and soothing scent, immersing your home in a beautifully relaxing mood. DISINFECTANT TOILET CLEANER: Simultaneously clean, disinfect and deodorize with Clorox Scentiva toilet bowl cleaner. Its trusted formula kills 99.9% of viruses and bacteria and fills your bathroom with relaxing scents. LEAVES YOUR TOILET CLEAN AND SHINY: Clorox Scentiva toilet cleaner removes rust and mineral stains; deodorizes and freshens leaving your toilet bowl sparkling clean and shiny. WIDE DISPENSING NOZZLE FOR COMPLETE BOWL COVERAGE: This Clorox bowl cleaner has an angled bottle design and a dispensing nozzle, that allows you to easily target and clean hard-to-reach areas like under the bowl rim. BLEACH FREE: This bleach-free toilet cleaner can be utilized whenever dirt, germs or stains build up. For a trusted Clorox clean, simply clean the toilet bowl with the brush and leave for 5 minutes to disinfect, then flush.

Loyal Liquid Laundry Detergent, 5000 ML (5000 ML) Pack of 2
LOYAL Liquid Laundry Detergent uses the natural power of enzymes to break down tough stains and eliminate bad odors. Our new formula is designed to prolong the lifetime of your fabrics, preventing fading and discoloration while keeping your clothes clean, soft and smelling fresh all day. Suitable for all types of washing machines, LOYAL Liquid Laundry Detergent is the ideal choice for easy and worry-free laundry care. Fragrance: Our signature sent carefully blends the familiar fruity scents of citrus, pear, and sweet apples with the enchanting aromas of a field of fresh flowers, finishing with sweet yet pungent notes of vanilla and amber, to leave you feeling fresh, clean and bold to energize your day. SOOTHING FLORAL MUSK FRAGRANCE: This antibacterial cleaning spray in floral musk scent refreshes your surfaces with a sweet scent of blooming flowers, transforming your chore into a moment of joy. 100% STAIN REMOVAL: Jif Antibacterial Clean Multipurpose Spray provides 100% stain removal, leaving your surfaces sparkling clean and fresh. KILLS 99.9% OF GERMS: It kills 99.9% of germs from all types of surfaces, keeping your family protected and your home germ-free. HOW TO USE: Spray the product on the dirty surface and wipe with a moist sponge or cloth. For deep antibacterial action on small surfaces, leave the product to act for 5 minutes before rinsing. item.description: OMO Laundry Liquid Detergent, Floral Bloom, Touch of Comfort Long-Lasting Freshness up to 14 Days, up to 100% Stain Removal in 1 wash, 1.8L NEW IMPROVED FORMULA AND A FRESH NEW LOOK: OMO Floral Bloom Touch of Comfort Liquid Laundry Detergent, now with a fresh new look. THE NEW FORMULA PROVIDES UP TO 100% STAIN REMOVAL IN 1 WASH*: It is especially formulated to remove the toughest stains, while being gentle on fabric. IT TARGETS THE ROOT OF THE STAIN: OMO touch of comfort liquid washing detergent formula dissolves rapidly and penetrates fabric deeply to target the root of the stain and lift it completely. LONG-LASTING FRESHNESS FOR UP TO 14 DAYS: Enjoy long-lasting freshness with delicate floral fragrance that keeps your laundry smelling clean and fresh for days. USAGE & DOSAGE: Liquid detergent for light or medium soiled clothes, use 100ml of the detergent and for heavily soiled clothes, use 115ml. 1 cap = 135ml. EXPLORE THE FULL RANGE OF OMO LIQUID LAUNDRY DETERGENT: OMO Touch of Comfort for a fresh fragrance, OMO Sensitive for delicate skin and OMO BLACK for Abayas and Black Fabrics.

Clorox Scentiva Toilet Cleaner, Madagascar Citrus Grove, Bleach Free Toilet Bowl Cleaner,709ml Pack of 12
DISINFECT AND SET THE MOOD: Our scents were inspired by nature and exclusively crafted by top fragrance houses. Let the Japanese Spring Blossom scent welcome you with its aromatic and soothing scent, immersing your home in a beautifully relaxing mood. DISINFECTANT TOILET CLEANER: Simultaneously clean, disinfect and deodorize with Clorox Scentiva toilet bowl cleaner. Its trusted formula kills 99.9% of viruses and bacteria and fills your bathroom with relaxing scents. LEAVES YOUR TOILET CLEAN AND SHINY: Clorox Scentiva toilet cleaner removes rust and mineral stains; deodorizes and freshens leaving your toilet bowl sparkling clean and shiny. WIDE DISPENSING NOZZLE FOR COMPLETE BOWL COVERAGE: This Clorox bowl cleaner has an angled bottle design and a dispensing nozzle, that allows you to easily target and clean hard-to-reach areas like under the bowl rim. BLEACH FREE: This bleach-free toilet cleaner can be utilized whenever dirt, germs or stains build up. For a trusted Clorox clean, simply clean the toilet bowl with the brush and leave for 5 minutes to disinfect, then flush.
item.title: Clorox MTBC Citrus 709ML-Pack of 12
